title: Finance Intern
description_html:
Seniority Level: Internship

Become an intern at AB InBev in the vibrant city of Prague!

Purpose:

Brewing the world’s most loved beers and building brands consumers love, AB InBev is where ownership, ambition, and action thrive. We empower you to dream big, lead change, and create a long-lasting legacy. We value relentless problem-solvers who take accountability, embrace challenges, and turn bold goals into results through resilience and hard work.  

 

That’s Who We Are: Come and OWN IT

Internship Description

This internship is a full-time, unpaid opportunity in our Prague Capability Hub, with a chance for you to discover what it's like to work in one of the top 5 FMCG companies in the world. You will work on real business projects and will be in frequent contact with your line manager to align on your next steps and responsibilities.

As an intern, you'll get the chance to experience the “real life” business whilst developing your skills - learning through experiencing different areas of the business and building your own reputation. With the right focus and attitude, the internship can lead to a long-lasting career with AB InBev. You will work in our Finance department and will be in frequent contact with your line manager to align on your next steps and responsibilities.

What will you be doing?

Take your first steps into the world of Finance within AB InBev! There are 4 different teams that you can join:

Our Risk Management team is responsible for assessing the credit risk of new and existing customers. As an intern, you will be monitoring the financial risk and payment behavior of both type of customers. On top, you will have the opportunity to participate in different projects, such as reporting, improving payment behavior data models and credit risk models. This experience will teach you how to work with analytical tools such as Power BI and Power Query.

The Credit Management team is in direct contact with our customers to continuously improve the cash flow of the company. You will play a crucial role to cooperate with Sales to ensure that customers have good payment behavior and sustainable volumes. This internship is an excellent opportunity to understand how a large multinational operates, because you will manage processes with a lot of stakeholders (Sales, CX, AR, Invoicing, Logistics etc.) and will receive a personal target to improve one of these processes. You will learn how to drive financial results while boosting volumes and customer satisfaction.

Our Dispute Management team owns the end-to-end process of disputes resolution and the deductions applied. As an intern, you will help delegate and follow-up on the requests impacting the process with all implicated stakeholders: Credit, Sales Finance, Trade Investment Cell, Key Account Managers, FP&A, Invoicing etc. You will ensure that all requests are treated within the pre-determined Service Level Agreement parameters and will continuously look for improvements & automation opportunities across the process to reduce the lead time on the dispute resolution.

Lastly, in our Trade Investment Cell team, you will focus on knock off invoices with corresponding accruals, validating outstanding accruals as well as reviewing and verifying contracts, ERP records & invoices to ensure compliance. You will also help us drive the standardization across various processes, customer groups and market segments to comply to the most efficient standard way of working.

Based on the availability at the point of application and your personal ambitions, we will further guide you towards a position in one of the above-mentioned teams.

Internship Duration

The duration of the internship can range from 3 to 6 months or more, depending on your availability.

Learning Opportunities

70% of your learning will come from on-the-job learning. As an intern, you'll get the chance to experience the real-life business whilst developing your skills - learning through experiencing different areas and building your own reputation.

20% of your learning will come from mentorship programs, coaching, collaboration with key stakeholders & plenty of opportunities for feedback.

10% of your learning will come from formal trainings, including workshops & online training courses. We will provide you with continuous opportunities to elevate your skills with access to free training sessions facilitated by AB InBev.

Prague Experience

  • You will immerse yourself in a vibrant corporate environment with a global reach and emphasis on a positive workplace culture.
  • You will enjoy the Open Beer Bar twice a week and you will be partaking in corporate events that bring teams together and engage in enriching team-building activities.
  • You will experience a sense of community within the internship program, providing a supportive network for personal and professional development. You will engage with like-minded peers, exchange ideas, and benefit from the wealth of knowledge and experiences shared within our international AB InBev internship community. Approximately 60% of our workforce consists of expats.

Other Benefits For Interns

  • Box of beer every month.
  • 1-month trial period of MultiSport Card.
  • AB InBev internal trainings (Project Management, Effective Communication, Data Automation, Microsoft Excel, Data Analytics, etc.).
  • Exclusive discounts on leading brands such as Datart, and HP Market.
  • Refer a friend - get a box of beer.
  • Global Mobility with Erasmus+ grant– meet the criteria and you might be able to apply for the Erasmus+ Traineeship grant program for a chance to experience new cultures, broaden your horizons and contribute to your personal and professional growth.

Ultimately, with the right focus and attitude, a successful internship could open doors to a potential long-lasting career within the company. Demonstrate your skills, dedication, and adaptability, and you may find yourself with the exciting prospect of receiving a job offer from AB InBev.

Internship Requirements

We are looking for a candidate who:

  • Is currently enrolled as a university student or recently graduated.
  • Has legal authorization to work in the Czech Republic.
  • Demonstrates a willingness to relocate to the Czech Republic for the duration of the internship.
  • Exhibits an advanced level of proficiency in English, Dutch, French, Italian or German.
  • Displays a proactive issue-solving mindset, interest in Finance and a strong eagerness to learn.
  • Ideally has knowledge of Microsoft Office tools (Outlook, Excel, Word, PowerPoint), Power BI, SAP or programming experience.
  • Ideally possesses skills in data analysis and customer service.
  • Understands and aligns with the team/company culture and goals, taking proactive steps to contribute to their achievement.
  • Is capable of handling confidential information with trustworthiness and discretion.
  • Has the ability to comprehend end-to-end processes and optimize them for efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Demonstrates a keen sense of stakeholder management responsibilities and can effectively manage tasks with multiple deadlines.
  • Excels as a team player, fostering strong relationships with colleagues and key contacts.

Why build your career with us

We recruit for mindset, ambition, cultural fit, and growth opportunities.

UNIQUE CULTURE

We are proud to be part of something bigger than ourselves and are passionate about building upon our company’s long legacy. We believe in collaboration and candor, which results in a dynamic culture with open communication.

 

BRANDS EVERYONE LOVES

We are part of the collective, global history of beer. We are the proud makers of more than 500 iconic brands, from beloved international classics to local favorites. 

 

GROWTH OPPORTUNITIES

Our people grow at the pace of their talent. We empower our people to learn, expand their perspectives, and unlock career growth.

If this sounds like the incredible opportunity you’ve been waiting for, apply today.

What happens next?

Step 1: Online Application

Submit your application online to get started.

Step 2: Video Assessment

Keep an eye on your inbox for an invitation to complete a short video assessment that will help us better understand you and assess how well you'll fit within our teams and company. You can also expect questions about your availability for an internship and your role preferences.

Step 3: Line Manager Review

If your assessment goes well, we'll share your profile with the relevant hiring team for further consideration. We'll aim to provide you with the feedback within 10 working days.

Step 4: Online Interview

If we see a strong match, we'll schedule a brief 30-minute online interview with the hiring team. This is an opportunity for us to get to know each other better, after which we can typically make the hiring decision.

Step 5: The Offer

If we're the right fit for each other, we'll extend an offer, marking the beginning of your exciting journey with us.

We're looking forward to connect with you.

ZoneEU

title: DATOVÝ ANALYTIK – DATA WAREHOUSE & REPORTING
description_html:
RENOMIA – středoevropská jednička v pojišťovnictví hledá nové talenty! Jsme největší pojišťovací makléř a firma orientovaná na Risk managment u našich klientů, v České republice. Na trhu působíme 32 let a kanceláře máme ve 13 zemích regionu CEE. Partnerství s akcionářsky spřízněnou společností Gallagher, třetím největším globálním pojišťovacím makléřem, nám umožňuje poskytovat služby po celém světě. Díky unikátnímu spojení hodnot rodinné firmy a mezinárodního know-how nabízíme jedinečné pracovní prostředí a stabilní zázemí. Připojte se k nám a staňte se součástí příběhu, který mění svět pojišťovnictví!

Chceš pracovat s daty, která mají skutečný dopad na rozhodování firmy? Baví tě kombinace analytického myšlení, moderních technologií a hledání hodnoty v číslech? Pak hledáme právě tebe!

🚀 Co Tě u Nás Čeká

  • Budeš součástí BI týmu, který tvoří datové srdce naší firmy
  • Práce s datovým skladem a jeho rozvojem – od návrhu až po optimalizaci
  • Tvorba interaktivních reportů a dashboardů v Power BI, které pomáhají businessu k lepším rozhodnutím
  • Near-realtime datová analýza, emebedování reportů do aplikací a zapojení agentních systémů do reportingu
  • Transformace a modelování dat v BigQuery a DBT
  • Spolupráce s kolegy napříč firmou na definici a realizaci datových potřeb
  • Monitoring kvality dat a hledání cest, jak zlepšit naši datovou infrastrukturu
  • Zapojení do DevOps procesů (verzování, CI/CD, deployment modelů)

🛠️ S čím u nás budeš pracovat

  • Power BI – vizualizace a reporting
  • Google BigQuery – analýza velkých datových sad pomocí SQL
  • DBT (Data Build Tool) – transformace a dokumentace datových pipeline
  • DevOps základy – Git, CI/CD, deployment

🌟 Koho hledáme

  • Máš zkušenosti s datovými sklady a SQL
  • Ideálně už umíš pracovat s Power BI, BigQuery nebo DBT – pokud ne, nevadí, důležitá je chuť se učit
  • Zajímá tě AI a moderní technologie v datovém světě
  • Jsi analytický typ, který rád hledá souvislosti a navrhuje řešení
  • Nechybí ti samostatnost, zodpovědnost a schopnost spolupráce v týmu

💡 Proč k nám

  • Práce na smysluplných projektech, kde tvoje analýzy uvidíš v reálném byznysovém dopadu
  • Možnost učit se od zkušeného BI týmu a rozvíjet se v nejmodernějších technologiích
  • Prostředí, kde se podporuje inovace, otevřenost a sdílení nápadů
  • Stabilní firma s vizí, kde se spojuje profesionalita s lidským přístupem

Naše benefity – proč u nás budete chtít pracovat?

  • Zázemí lídra na trhu. Jsme stabilní česká společnost s nadnárodním dosahem. Na trhu působíme už od roku 1993 a jsme jedničkou ve svém oboru. Naši klienti se na nás spoléhají díky profesionálním službám a odbornosti.
  • Skvělé prostředí, kde vládne férovost a lidský přístup. Na Atmoskopu 87 % zaměstnanců oceňuje své kolegy a 85 % své nadřízené. Otevřená komunikace a týmová spolupráce nejsou jen fráze – opravdu to tu žijeme.
  • Flexibilita na prvním místě. Pracujte tak, jak vám to vyhovuje – kombinujeme 3 dny v kanceláři a 2 dny na Home Office. Flexibilní pracovní doba vám navíc umožní přizpůsobit den vašim potřebám (v kanceláři od 9:00 do 16:00, zbytek času je vás).
  • Více volna, více času na sebe a rodinu. Máme 5 týdnů dovolené a navíc 3 extra dny na rodinu (Family Days). K tomu přidáváme den volna na dobrovolnictví nebo podporu vaší dobročinné aktivity prostřednictvím grantu až 15 000 Kč.
  • Odpočinek i zábava. V naší Cafeterii najdete ročně 10 200 bodů (1 bod = 1 Kč) na dovolenou, sport, kulturu nebo volný čas. Stravenky jsou samozřejmostí (130 Kč na den) a můžete se těšit i na dotovanou Multisport kartu.
  • Odměňujeme loajalitu i úspěchy. Dvakrát ročně získáte odměnu za vaše výsledky (13. a 14. mzda). K tomu přidáváme věrnostní bonusy za odpracované roky a opravdu atraktivní odměnu za doporučení nového kolegy/kolegyně.
  • Výhodné produkty, které vám usnadní život. Nabízíme zvýhodněné podmínky u našich partnerských služeb – od hypoték přes cestovní pojištění, pojištění nemovitosti nebo auta, až po leasing. A přispíváme na doplňkové penzijní spoření až 30 000 Kč ročně.
  • Moderní kanceláře v srdci Prahy. Naše prostory nejen skvěle vypadají, ale jsou i pohodlné a plné života.
  • Podpora vzdělávání a kariérního růstu. Záleží nám na vašem profesním i osobním rozvoji. Zajistíme vám odborné kurzy, certifikace nebo plně hrazené jazykové vzdělávání. Ať už chcete růst horizontálně nebo vertikálně, máte u nás prostor.
  • Přátelská atmosféra na firemních akcích. Těšte se na sportovní aktivity, týmové výjezdy nebo celofiremní setkání. A Mikuláš? To je už naše tradice.

Pokud vás to zaujalo, těšíme se na vaše CV! Podívejte se na náš profil na Atmoskopu, kde najdete další detaily i pohled zaměstnanců: Atmoskop – RENOMIA.

O pobočce

Staňte se součástí příběhu RENOMIA – rodinné firmy s vizí, kde kancelář není jen místem, ale centrem spolupráce.

Jaké to v RENOMIA je? Jak fungujeme? Pro někoho „jen kancelář“. Pro nás prostor, kde vznikají nápady a strategie, které přinášejí jistotu klientům. Přidejte se k nám a staňte se součástí české rodinné firmy se silným mezinárodním zázemím.

title: Junior Specialista/ka Asset Management pro systémy GIS/GDO, EA aximo
description_html:
Proč se přidat ke GasNetu?

  • Staráme se o největší distribuční plynárenskou síť v České republice.
  • Zajišťujeme bezpečné a spolehlivé dodávky plynu pro více než 2,3 miliónu odběratelů.
  • Jsme součástí kritické infrastruktury a jsme nepostradatelní pro chod tuzemské ekonomiky.
  • Máme silné zázemí v podobě odpovědných akcionářů, kterými jsou Skupina ČEZ, British Columbia Investment Management Corporation (BCI) a Allianz Capital Partners (zastupující pojišťovací společnosti skupiny Allianz).

Chci pracovat v GasNetu

Vaší Pracovní Náplní Bude

  • spolupráce při správě geografického informačního systému (GDO) - systém s mapou, kde jsou všechny naše plynovody a zařízení (aktiva),
  • učit se, jak funguje EAM (Enterprise Asset Management) - centrální registr všech aktiv s obsahem kmenových dat o plynovodech, regulačních stanicích a dalších zařízeních,

Hledáme Právě Vás, Pokud

  • aktivně pracujete v Microsoft Word, Excel, výhodou je znalost Python, SQL, nebo s GIS a databázemi,

  • pružnou pracovní dobu s pevným jádrem od 9:00 - 14:00 hod.,

title: eDiscovery Specialist - Forensic Technology Team
description_html:
Description & Requirements

Who we are looking for

🕵️Use AI and technology to transform legal investigations.

You will help law firms and corporations uncover digital evidence, manage complex datasets, and ensure legal compliance in major cases. By combining AI-powered tools with forensic expertise, you’ll play a key role in protecting business integrity and supporting justice across Central Europe.

We’d ideally like to find a junior colleague, but we’d also be happy to meet someone more experienced — so keep reading.

👉What You Will Do:

  • Collect and process electronic documents from computers, emails, and cloud platforms.
  • Manage large-scale AI-assisted document reviews and discovery workflows.
  • Analyze metadata and communication patterns to identify key evidence.
  • Work closely with legal teams to define discovery strategies and produce defensible results.
  • Collaborate with colleagues across digital forensics, data analytics, and fraud investigations to deliver integrated solutions.

Your Team Environment:

✔️You will join a 25-person forensic team at the intersection of law, technology, and investigation.

✔️We’re a collaborative, first-name culture where knowledge sharing, mentoring, and teamwork are essential. ✔️You’ll be supported by experienced professionals and have the opportunity to work on both local and international eDiscovery projects.

🎯Expectations:

  • University degree (any field – we value diverse educational backgrounds).
  • Analytical mindset and strong attention to detail.
  • Comfort working with technology and large datasets.
  • Advanced English (spoken and written) and fluency in Czech or Slovak.
  • Basic understanding of SQL or Python, or readiness to learn quickly.
  • Interest in legal technology, data management, or litigation support.

For advanced level candidate (2-3 years od experience): - Proven expertise in eDiscovery with demonstrable experience in: - Proficiency with eDiscovery platforms (Relativity, Nuix, or similar) - Experience managing document review projects and data processing workflows

  • Understanding of legal discovery procedures and compliance requirements - Track record of managing eDiscovery projects or litigation support workstreams - Knowledge of data privacy regulations and cross-border data transfer requirements - Experience with client relationship management and legal team coordination

?Your Growth Path

  • First 6 months: Learn key eDiscovery platforms and workflows with mentor support.
  • Year 1: Manage components of eDiscovery projects and present progress to case teams.
  • Year 2+: Specialize in areas such as AI-powered document review, data privacy, or cross-border investigations.

Your career can evolve toward technical expertise, team leadership, or innovation in legal technology and AI-based discovery.

🏆Why Join Us:

  • Access to AI-enhanced legal technology (RelativityOne and proprietary add-ons).
  • Exposure to high-impact cases and international projects.
  • Supportive culture with mentoring, transparent growth paths, and continuous learning - buddy and coach since day 1.
  • A Cafeteria benefit program loaded with 31,200 points per year. You can use them as you like — for meal vouchers, pension insurance, sports, culture, health, language courses, and more.
  • Flexible work options, possibility of home office, 25 vacation days, 2 personal days.
  • Services of a physiotherapist, masseur, dry cleaner or tailor who regularly visit our offices.
  • In challenging situations, our assistance program is here to help — qualified experts can provide you with legal, financial, or psychological support.
  • Modern office near the Main Train Station with gym, café, yoga space, and rooftop terrace.
  • You’ll also receive a laptop and a phone of your choice (Apple/Samsung).
  • If you’re into sports, you’ll definitely appreciate a contribution to a Multisport card.
  • For your travel adventures, we’ll be happy to provide worldwide insurance.
  • Referral bonus for recommending a new colleague – you can earn between CZK 15,000 and 100,000.
  • Health comes first – that’s why we offer access to the online medical platform uLékaře.cz, and we also organize Health Days in our offices with free workshops and professional check-ups. You can also top up your vitamins with a regular supply of fresh fruit in the office.

📧After you apply:

  • Intro chat with recruiter Andrea.
  • Technical interview with team leads Štěpán, André, or Martin (includes a practical case).
  • Final conversation with Tomáš, Partner of Forensic Department, about your fit and career goals.

🟢Join us and help shape the future of AI-powered eDiscovery and legal technology in Central Europe.🟢

title: PAM / CyberArk Specialist
description_html:
About The Team

We help integrate security elements efficiently and reliably into the technological units of the client's business. We provide assurance that any changes affecting the IT environment will be fundamentally safe and allow a quick return on the client's investment. The team, which focuses on privileged access management, identities, data security and cloud security, is part of our broader Cyber Security team.

About The Manager

Martin Zbořil is a leader of the Identity and Cloud Security team and his major experience lies in cloud security. Within this area, Martin also finished his PhD study. Besides cloud security, he has extensive knowledge also of many other areas of cybersecurity. Martin builds a cross-functional team that includes the IAM area and cloud security with a strong focus on protection of data in the cloud. Martin pays great attention to upskilling and personal development which might be considered also as his hobby. In his personal life, he is a sports enthusiast and among his favorite sports belong football, golf, skiing, gym, cycling, tennis and many others.

Job Description & Summary

Terms like Cyber Security, PAM, CyberArk and IAM are not new to you? As a member or our team, you will primarily participate in the implementation of CyberArk like EPV, PVWA, CPM, PSM, EPM, Conjur and various connection components in companies from different sectors. You will look for opportunities for improvement, prepare documents for implementations that will help clients to run their environment more safely and efficiently and many other diverse projects.

What we expect

  • We do not expect that you will master all of this, but we value your interest and desire to develop in the following areas, primarily in Privileged Account Management.
  • Experience with the implementation of CyberArk or other PAM and IAM technological solutions (Delinea, Wallix, SailPoint, ForgeRock, etc.)
  • Windows, Linux or MS Active Directory administration
  • Understanding of Authentication, Authorization and Cryptography
  • Knowledge of security mechanisms in processes such as Identity and Access Management, Privileged Access Management
  • Basics of scripting (e.g. in Powershell, Python)
  • Knowledge of high availability principles
  • DevOps Standards like ISO27k or NIST
  • Czech language is a MUST!

Your advantages could be:

  • Experience with keys, secrets and certificate management.
  • Project management skills.
  • Experience with Entra ID or identity management systems.
  • Achieved certification in cyber security

Our Benefits and Fun

  • Concentrated experience and rapid career growth. It may sound like a platitude, but it really is.
  • Flexible working hours.
  • Fair salary plus paid overtime and annual bonus.
  • Paid time off 20 + 5 days, 3 wellbeing days and 2 extra days off from the company at the end of the year.
  • High-end Ultrabook and iPhone with unlimited data.
  • Benefit program with 45.000 points that you can use for holidays, education, food vouchers, sports, health... Simply on what you enjoy.

title: PAM / CyberArk Specialist
description_html:
About The Team

We help integrate security elements efficiently and reliably into the technological units of the client's business. We provide assurance that any changes affecting the IT environment will be fundamentally safe and allow a quick return on the client's investment. The team, which focuses on privileged access management, identities, data security and cloud security, is part of our broader Cyber Security team.

About The Manager

Martin Zbořil is a leader of the Identity and Cloud Security team and his major experience lies in cloud security. Within this area, Martin also finished his PhD study. Besides cloud security, he has extensive knowledge also of many other areas of cybersecurity. Martin builds a cross-functional team that includes the IAM area and cloud security with a strong focus on protection of data in the cloud. Martin pays great attention to upskilling and personal development which might be considered also as his hobby. In his personal life, he is a sports enthusiast and among his favorite sports belong football, golf, skiing, gym, cycling, tennis and many others.

Job Description & Summary

Terms like Cyber Security, PAM, CyberArk and IAM are not new to you? title: Software Design Engineer for Software Testing
description_html:
Job Description

Are you ready to launch your career into the stratosphere? Join us and work on cutting-edge aerospace technologies—from next-generation fighter jets to air taxis for the Olympic Games. This is your chance to contribute to projects involving Boeing, Airbus, and other unique innovations that shape the future of aviation!

This is a hybrid role, 3 days in office, 2 from home.

Please note that due to export restrictions, we will only be able to take into consideration applicants with an EU.

About Us

Since the invention of autopilot in 1914, we’ve been a leader in innovation for the Air Travel industry. Today, thousands of Honeywell products are used in aircraft and airports around the world. Every day, 140,000 Honeywell air turbine starters bring to life commercial and military aircraft, industrial and marine equipment.

Our mission: More sustainable travel, safer and more efficient flying, and a focus on cutting-edge innovation.

Responsibilities

Why This Role?

  • Work on real aerospace projects—planes not yet in use, next-gen fighter technology, and future air mobility.
  • Be part of a team that values innovation, learning, and ambition.
  • A true rocket start for your career in software development.

What You’ll Do

  • Verify and validate real-time embedded control aviation software.
  • Perform testing and documentation in accordance with DO-178 guidelines.
  • Develop tests, tools, and environments to support software testing.
  • Provide status reports to management and support project needs.
  • Contribute to innovation in tools and processes within Software V&V.

Qualifications

What We’re Looking For

  • Fresh graduates are welcome!
  • Good knowledge of C languages.
  • A good command of English (mandatory).
  • Strong technical writing skills.
  • Capability and willingness to travel.
  • Good knowledge of Windows/Unix scripting languages (e.g., Python).

Nice to Have

  • Knowledge of commercial airborne standards, including DO-178.
  • Experience with embedded testing.
  • Familiarity with aerospace or high-tech projects.

We Offer

  • Enjoy 25 vacation days per year
  • Meal allowance
  • Benefit Plus Cafeteria Card available to all employees
  • To promote health and wellbeing we provide life insurance coverage, employer contribution to Pension saving scheme or long-term investment product (DIP)
  • Multisport Card, Makro Card, discount at T-Mobile tariffs and multiple discount programs in our partner network
  • Fresh fruit twice a week
  • 3 plus 2 hybrid work arrangement to support your work-life balance
  • Flexible working hours
  • Work in international environment
  • Recognition & Referral bonus programs
  • Employee Assistance Program - Free and confidential service to help with any difficulties regarding work, life and personal or family matters
  • Honeywell Learning & Development Center – learning platform with over 10,000 courses from Udemy
  • Frequent Employee Engagement activities fostering an inclusive and diverse work environment
  • Global employee networks to help you connect and grow
  • Comprehensive induction, ongoing training, and development to set you up for success, in-house and external learning platforms supporting development opportunities

Join Honeywell - A Global Leader in Innovation!

At Honeywell, we are proud to be an international employer with a robust presence in over 70 countries. Our diverse workforce fosters innovation through collaboration and inclusiveness.

We are seeking dynamic individuals who thrive in fast-paced environments to join our team. Here, you’ll have the opportunity to work alongside talented professionals from around the world, contributing to exciting projects and pioneering solutions that impact industries globally.

At Honeywell, your career can soar with access to global resources and continuous development programs. If you are ready to take your professional journey to the next level, explore our opportunities today!

Ready to take off? Apply now and be part of something extraordinary!

About Us

Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. As a trusted partner, we provide actionable solutions and innovation through our Aerospace Technologies, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Industrial Automation business segments – powered by our Honeywell Forge software – that help make the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.

title: Technical Trainee - SW
description_html:
Valeo est une entreprise mondiale de haute technologie qui conçoit des solutions révolutionnaires pour réinventer la mobilité. Nous sommes un équipementier partenaire des constructeurs automobiles et des acteurs de la nouvelle mobilité dans le monde entier. Notre vision ? Inventer une mobilité plus verte et plus sûre, grâce à des solutions axées sur la conduite intuitive et la réduction des émissions de CO2. Nous sommes leaders dans nos domaines d'activité et reconnus comme l'une des plus grandes entreprises innovantes au monde.

The Lidar department of the Valeo R&D Center in Prague is developing the flagship among our sensors~ the Valeo SCALA® lidar is the first and still the only mass-produced automotive laser sensor on the market. It can detect obstacles on the road up to a distance of 200 meters and classify them in all weather conditions. It is used by carmakers for their most advanced models such as the Mercedes S-Class, Audi A8 or Honda Legend. Up to 30% of new premium vehicles are to reach level 3 of autonomous driving by 2030, and to do so, they will have to be equipped with lidar technology. We develop hardware, software, optics, mechanical construction, execute system testing and industrialization of this product.

The LiDAR team is currently looking for Technical Trainee - SW

YOUR CHALLENGES~

  • Development of software tools and KPI scripts for validation and verification of algorithms and systems based on functional requirements
  • Development of HIL solutions for system validation
  • Suport in Design and implementation of SW toolchain for better ease of use of individual systems and automating development processes
  • Support in Documentation of implemented solutions according to the Valeo standard
  • Administration, maintenance and modification of implemented solutions according to current requirements
  • Performing Specification reviews, Software Design Reviews and Peer Code Reviews on a regular basis
  • Collaboration in the creation of system specifications and system requirements, communication with interested teams
  • Ensuring software quality in accordance with company processes

Let's Talk About You…

  • C++ Experience/knowledge (would be an advantage, not essential).
  • English language (Intermediate level), Czech/slovak language (advanced level)
  • Teamwork and proactive approach
  • Part-time 20 hours/ week time availability
  • Based in the Czech Republic and willing to commute to the offices in Prague at least 1 day a week

WE OFFER

  • Paid Vacation entitlement for DPČ

  • meal vouchers and leisure contribution
  • possibility of Multisport card
  • fitness room and external sports ground (football, basketball, volleyball) on site

  • easy access to work by Prague metro line A, car parking for all employees
  • personal development program through technical trainings and language courses
  • regular company team building events
  • outdoor relax zone with a barbecue space for team building

Software

2025-10-03

title: Software Engineer - fresh graduate
description_html:
Job Description

We are looking for Fresh graduated candidates with finishing the University in academic year 2025/2026.

Starting day June 1st, 2026 onward!

EU visa and work permission mandatory!

We are seeking a motivated Software Engineer to join our team in Prague, where you will work with experienced engineers to build Opower platform and products that make a real-world impact. In this role, you will have the chance to contribute to software development, learning how to build scalable and user-friendly products.

You will be part of an international team, providing you with plenty of exposure to various modern technologies and agile processes.

To that end, we are looking for an entry-level software developer who is passionate about building software that makes a real difference in the world, and who has the skills and strong desire to learn about software development and cloud technologies, write code in our stack, and think critically about our role in the business.

If you have experience as a professional software engineer, that's great - but, our focus is on the skills you have and skills you can develop while you're here. As long as you're ready and eager to learn about the utility business and our platform's business context, you'll succeed.

Responsibilities

  • Learn about and contribute to the development of new features for energy management products that help customers reduce their energy and water usage.
  • Work alongside experienced engineers to deliver features and learn the ropes of coding, testing, and debugging.
  • Contribute to solving bugs and improving the performance of existing Opower platform or product features in collaboration with team members.
  • Help develop complex web modules and their supporting back-end services using Java , JavaScript, NodeJS, React, and Redux.
  • Use test-driven development to ensure all code is thoroughly tested using Enzyme, Karma, Storybooks, Loki, Ava, Selenium, and Junit.
  • Triage, troubleshoot, and fix bugs anywhere in the web module stack, from React web components to Java Dropwizard services.
  • Own small-to-medium sized tasks or features, including writing simple design summaries to guide your work.


Required Skills

  • To be graduated with a bachelor’s or or to be close to completing a Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
  • Basic knowledge of at least one programming language (Java, JavaScript, Python, etc.).
  • Some experience with JavaScript, HTML, CSS, or any related web technologies is appreciated.
  • A basic understanding of software development principles (e.g., version control, testing, agile practices, etc.).
  • A strong desire to learn about software development, cloud technologies, and distributed systems.
  • Strong communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills.
  • Self-driven, curious, and motivated to learn and grow as a software engineer.

title: Junior IT Business Analyst
description_html:
About The Role

As a Junior IT Business Analyst, you'll serve as a bridge between our application engineers and business stakeholders, helping to design, build, and enhance IT solutions that power our financial reporting systems. You'll balance exciting project work with operational support, ensuring our systems run smoothly through each quarterly cycle.

Key Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with business customers to gather requirements, conduct testing, and implement change requests that enhance system functionality
  • Support quarterly closing activities by managing interfaces and resolving incidents and defects to ensure timely regulatory reporting
  • Analyze system processes and propose improvements to optimize efficiency and accuracy
  • Share knowledge about applications and processes to strengthen team capabilities
  • Foster a culture of continuous improvement through proactive problem-solving and process refinement

About The Team

Solvency II IT team is a Bratislava based team of IT Business Analysts responsible for operating and improving IT process to support Finance and Actuarial colleagues. We ensure smooth and efficient quarterly closing activities related to the regulatory reporting for EU & UK regulators. The team is part of larger projects and initiatives to meet the regulation and adapt to new technologies within Swiss Re.

About You

You enjoy solving problems and translating business needs into technical solutions. You thrive in collaborative environments where clear communication is essential, and you're eager to learn new technologies and business domains. Your attention to detail and organizational skills help you manage multiple priorities effectively.

We Are Looking For Candidates Who Meet These Requirements

  • Analytical and problem-solving mindset
  • Strong organizational, time management, and communication skills
  • Ability to quickly grasp concepts and think conceptually
  • Proactive team player with a collaborative approach

These Are Additional Nice To Haves

  • Basic understanding of SQL for data querying and analysis
  • Familiarity with agile development approaches (e.g., Scrum)
  • Experience with tools like Azure DevOps, Confluence or Databricks
  • Background in requirements gathering and documentation
  • Experience in financial services or regulatory reporting environments

Role

For Slovakia the base salary range for this position is between [EUR 1,500] and [EUR 2,500] per month (for a full-time role). The specific salary offered considers:

  • the requirements, scope, complexity and responsibilities of the role,
  • the applicant’s own profile including education/qualifications, expertise, specialisation, skills and experience.

In addition to your base salary, Swiss Re offers an attractive performance-based variable compensation component, designed to recognise your achievements. Further you will enjoy a variety of global and location specific benefits.

Eligibility may vary depending on the terms of Swiss Re policies and your employment contract.

About Swiss Re

Swiss Re is one of the world’s leading providers of reinsurance, insurance and other forms of insurance-based risk transfer, working to make the world more resilient. We anticipate and manage a wide variety of risks, from natural catastrophes and climate change to cybercrime. Combining experience with creative thinking and cutting-edge expertise, we create new opportunities and solutions for our clients. This is possible thanks to the collaboration of more than 14,000 employees across the world.

Our success depends on our ability to build an inclusive culture encouraging fresh perspectives and innovative thinking. We embrace a workplace where everyone has equal opportunities to thrive and develop professionally regardless of their age, gender, race, ethnicity, gender identity and/or expression, sexual orientation, physical or mental ability, skillset, thought or other characteristics. In our inclusive and flexible environment everyone can bring their authentic selves to work and their passion for sustainability.

If you are an experienced professional returning to the workforce after a career break, we encourage you to apply for open positions that match your skills and experience.

title: Intern - Analytics Solutions UX
description_html:
Job Description

We have a paid internship opportunity for students: Analytics Solutions UX Intern in Building Automation in Prague on part time.

Design, Develop, and Deploy Analytics Solutions with a Focus on User Experience for Global Teams

Are you a student passionate about analytics, technology, and user-centered design? Join our team as an Analytics Solutions UX Intern and help us deliver impactful analytics tools for our Building Automation teams around the world!

About The Role

As an intern, you'll collaborate with supply chain and customer experience teams to design, develop, and deploy digital analytics solutions. Your primary responsibility will be enhancing dashboards and analytics platforms using Power BI, ensuring that complex data is presented in clear, actionable formats that empower decision-making

This role is part of our University Relations program, designed to help students and recent graduates launch their careers with hands-on experience, mentorship, and opportunities for growth within Honeywell. This is hybrid work 3;2! The maximum number of hours worked per week is 20.

Honeywell

Honeywell Building Automation is transforming the way every building operates to help improve the quality of life for the people who use them. With a portfolio featuring software, hardware and services, Honeywell takes an outcome-focused approach to help building owners and operators improve safety and security, energy and operational efficiencies to create a better building experience.

Helping to Transform Buildings to be Safer and More Operationally and Energy Efficient.

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform crucial job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Join us now and be part of a global team of thinkers, innovators, dreamers, and doers who make the things that make the future!

Responsibilities

  • Work closely with cross-functional groups to identify user requirements for analytics solutions, focusing on both design and deployment.
  • Lead efforts to create, refine, and launch user-friendly dashboards in Power BI, prioritizing intuitive data visualizations and seamless user experiences.
  • Engage directly with users, gather feedback, and use their insights to guide the design and improvement of analytics tools.
  • Experiment with innovative design concepts, develop prototypes, and share best practices for analytics solution deployment.
  • Contribute to creating clear guidelines and standards for analytics design and deployment across the organization..
  • The maximum number of hours worked per week is 20.

Qualifications

  • We welcome applicants from any academic path, but you must be a final year bachelor student or have graduated within the past 12 months.
  • You must be fluent in written and spoken English.
  • Basic knowledge or strong interest in analytics, dashboard development, or Power BI.
  • Curiosity about how large organizations optimize supply chains and enhance customer experiences through analytics.
  • Passion for user experience (UX) and a drive to make analytics technology accessible and impactful.
  • Strong communication skills and an eagerness to learn how to turn data into compelling visual stories.
  • Openness to new ideas and a commitment to helping establish analytics best practices and standards.

We Offer

  • Gain hands-on experience designing, developing, and deploying analytics solutions that help global teams perform at their best.
  • Work alongside experienced professionals who will mentor and support your growth.
  • Directly influence how a global business leverages analytics and user experience in dashboard design and deployment.
  • Build essential skills for a future career in analytics, solution design, or business intelligence technology.

If you’re enthusiastic about analytics and user experience, and want to play a key role in helping teams worldwide make smarter decisions, join us as an Analytics Solutions UX Intern!

About Us

Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. As a trusted partner, we provide actionable solutions and innovation through our Aerospace Technologies, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Industrial Automation business segments – powered by our Honeywell Forge software – that help make the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.
